2026-02-25US OpenMild risk-on / orderly tapeUS open shows modest index strength and positive breadth among tracked names, led by BTC, TM, and LMT with no major downside dislocations.
2026-02-25EUBroad risk-on follow-throughUS-led upside breadth carries into Europe; software/high-beta lead while downside is shallow and concentrated.
2026-02-24US OpenMixed / selective risk-onIndices opened slightly positive, but dispersion remains high with notable single-name downside in DUOL/MA/RDDT/V.
2026-02-24Pre-closeBroad risk-on with cyclical catch-upIndices and most single names are green into the final hour, led by ADBE/DUOL/TSLA/BA while gold and BTC lag.
